name: ResonantOS
description: Experience layer on OpenClaw. Components: Shield, Logician, Guardian, Creative DNA, A2A, Crypto Wallet, DAO, Dashboard.

tasks.title: Shield integration
tasks.description: Wire Shield guard to live dashboard status

tasks.title: Dashboard polish
tasks.description: Complete UI cleanup, fix remaining bugs

tasks.title: R-Memory V2 migration
tasks.description: Implement new compression architecture per L3 plan

tasks.title: Documentation sync pipeline
tasks.description: SSOT → GitBook sync (paused pending privacy review)
tasks.blockedBy: Privacy review needed — private data in SSOT docs

tasks.title: Verify R-Awareness cold start mode
tasks.description: Test cold start functionality (coldStartOnly + coldStartDocs). Requires new session to verify turn 1 loads only whitelist, turn 2+ uses keyword matching. Cannot test in current session.

tasks.title: Convert protocols to OpenClaw skills
tasks.description: Old system used "protocols" — OpenClaw equivalent is skills. Port the full list of existing protocols into OpenClaw skill format.

tasks.title: SSoT context management UI + overview widget
tasks.description: Dashboard Overview: show list of currently injected SSoT docs (clickable). Allow removing individual docs (takes effect next turn). Add "clear all" button to offload entire SSoT context. Also expose in /R commands. Show doc count + token usage.

tasks.title: Re-enable Watchdog/Guardian
tasks.description: Watchdog code exists (guardian/watchdog.py) but services are disabled. Fix: (1) re-enable com.resonantos.watchdog-gateway.plist (currently .DISABLED), (2) fix guardian-health-check launchd (exit 127 — command not found), (3) verify watchdog.py monitors gateway and restarts on failure.

tasks.title: Update L1 Camouflage SSoT
tasks.description: Current: SSOT-L1-CAMOUFLAGE-DRAFT.md (draft, no .ai.md). Needs: review/finalize spec, generate compressed .ai.md version.

tasks.title: Update L1 Logician SSoT
tasks.description: Current: SSOT-L1-LOGICIAN-OLD.md (v1 spec). Needs: write updated spec reflecting current system, regenerate .ai.md.

tasks.title: Rebuild Crypto/DAO dashboard section
tasks.description: Recreate blockchain section of dashboard: (1) Wallet UI (Solana), (2) DAO access & voting interface, (3) Resonant Economy page, (4) NFT identity system — each ResonantOS instance gets a unique NFT as its identity (e.g. Augmentor = NFT). Details in DAO docs on website. Full UI rebuild needed.

tasks.title: Dashboard: Resonant Memory token savings tracker
tasks.description: Replace 'Sessions' card on Overview with 'Resonant Memory Savings' preview card. Click through to full stats page with: (1) Time ranges: per-session, per-day, per-month, lifetime. (2) Metrics: tokens consumed, equivalent API cost (Opus 4.6: $5/$25 MTok), tokens saved via compression, cost without compression, net savings. (3) Shareable banner generator: users create a branded graphic showing their savings stats, downloadable/postable to social media. Viral marketing loop — 'I saved $X with ResonantOS' banners. API cost only, no Claude Max.

tasks.title: Create missing agents: full roster
tasks.description:
Multi-agent architecture designed but only 'main' agent exists. Create all agents, each with own Telegram bot + specialized SOUL.md:

**Direct-chat agents (Manolo talks to them via Telegram):**
1. DAO agent — governance, voting, blockchain
2. YouTube agent — content creation, channel management
3. Website agent — ResonantOS website updates (Manolo works directly with this one)
4. Watchdog — fallback if Augmentor crashes; Manolo can guide it to restore system
5. Doer — mini-Augmentor, personal assistant with same agency level. Used when Augmentor is busy or session shouldn't be polluted with side tasks.

**Background agents (delegated by Augmentor):**
6. Coder — coding agent, delegates to Claude Code CLI

Main (Augmentor) = orchestrator/strategist. Delegates, stays available for Manolo.

tasks.title: Find and restore delegation protocol
tasks.description: A delegation format/protocol existed (possibly under a different name) for how the orchestrator delegates to sub-agents. Core principle: provide WHY + WHAT, agent determines HOW. Search r-memory archives, old session logs, and SSoT docs to locate it. If lost, recreate from scratch.

tasks.title: Fix Claude Code CLI reliability (Coder skill)
tasks.description: Claude Code CLI (v2.1.39) installed, coding-agent skill exists, but CLI frequently gets stuck during execution. Investigate root cause, fix or work around. This is the backbone of the Coder agent's coding delegation.

tasks.title: Define orchestrator role (Augmentor identity)
tasks.description: Clarify main agent's role: orchestrator/strategist, not worker. Primary job is to delegate to specialized agents, stay available for direct interaction with Manolo. Update SOUL.md, IDENTITY.md, and relevant SSoT docs to reflect this.

tasks.title: Implement memory log system
tasks.description: Implement the specific memory log format for structured memory logging. Medium-high priority.

tasks.title: Rewrite community Shield guide (simplified)
tasks.description: Current GitHub Shield doc is too long/complex with code. Need simplified, human-readable version: minimal instructions for AI to build a basic symbiotic shield. Core goal: check plugins/files for prompt injection, data exfiltration, malicious code. Reference open-source tools our Shield uses. DO NOT modify live doc without Manolo review — draft new version first.
